.. webcode documentation master file, created by
   sphinx-quickstart on Fri Jul 29 08:56:45 2016.
   You can adapt this file completely to your liking, but it should at least
   contain the root `toctree` directive.

Welcome to webcode's documentation!
===================================

This library is major used for developing website with django and vuejs.

从位置来分，可以分为前端，后端以及通信模块。此外，还有很多结合了前后端的功能，例如权限控制。

Contents:

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :numbered: 3

   admin/index
   backend/index
   frontend/index
   front_uis/index
   permit
   helpers
